metadata.description: Deploy Azure Databricks as a second analytics option next to Azure Data Explorer. When enabled, an Azure Databricks workspace is created and automatically configured with the OPC UA Delta tables, Event Hubs ingestion and a sample dashboard.
Provision a Microsoft Fabric F2 capacity as part of the main deployment. Enable this if you plan to deploy Microsoft Fabric after the main deployment.
Object ID of the custom-locations Microsoft Entra application. Obtain it by running az ad sp show --id bc313c14-388c-4e7d-a58e-70017303ee3b --query id -o tsv from the Azure CLI.

protectedSettings.commandToExecute: [concat('bash Bootstrap.sh ''', listkeys(variables('authRuleResourceId'), '2015-08-01').primaryConnectionString, ''' ''', resourceGroup().name, ''' ''', resourceGroup().location, ''' ''', variables('resourcesName'), ''' ''', reference(concat(variables('resourcesName'), '-Identity')).clientId, ''' ''', subscription().subscriptionId, ''' ''', parameters('customLocationsOid'), ''' ''', concat(variables('eventHubsNamespaceName'), '.servicebus.windows.net'), '''')]

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}', variables('adxClusterName'), 'ontologies','EventHubDataConnection')]
dependsOn: [resourceId('Microsoft.Kusto/clusters/databases/principalAssignments', variables('adxClusterName'), 'ontologies', guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Kusto/clusters/databases', split(format('{0}/{1}', variables('adxClusterName'), 'ontologies'), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', variables('adxClusterName'), 'ontologies'), '/')[1]), resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', concat(variables('resourcesName'), '-Identity')), 'Admin'))]

resources.comment: Waits for the ADX cluster to reach a terminal provisioning state before the Event Hub data connections are created. ARM dependsOn only waits for each child resource's own call to return, not for the cluster itself to settle, which intermittently caused 'RequestConflict: provisioning state is not terminal' when a data connection started while the cluster was still transitioning.
resources.name: [concat(variables('resourcesName'), '-WaitForAdxCluster')]

properties.scriptContent: set -e; echo "Waiting for ADX cluster ${ADX_CLUSTER_NAME} to reach a terminal provisioning state..."; az kusto cluster wait --created --name "${ADX_CLUSTER_NAME}" --resource-group "${RESOURCE_GROUP}" --subscription "${SUBSCRIPTION_ID}" --interval 15 --timeout 1500; echo "ADX cluster ${ADX_CLUSTER_NAME} provisioning state: $(az kusto cluster show --name "${ADX_CLUSTER_NAME}" --resource-group "${RESOURCE_GROUP}" --subscription "${SUBSCRIPTION_ID}" --query provisioningState -o tsv)"

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}', variables('adxClusterName'), 'ontologies', guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Kusto/clusters/databases', split(format('{0}/{1}', variables('adxClusterName'), 'ontologies'), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', variables('adxClusterName'), 'ontologies'), '/')[1]), resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', concat(variables('resourcesName'), '-Identity')), 'Admin'))]
